rows.source_ref: "Close all trades with a push of a button?" by simple4x, ForexFactory Thread 97002 (2 posts), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/97002
rows.concept: A user simply asks for an MT4 script/hotkey to close all open positions at once while in profit — no trading edge is described.
rows.eligibility_reason: No trading edge or entry/exit rules; thread is a request for a close-all-positions utility button, not a strategy.
rows.notes: Two-post thread; second post ('ForexPower: Here.') just links a script. Trade-management tooling, not a mechanizable strategy.

notes: zero usable candidates: thread is a close-all-trades utility request, not a strategy
